evals.name: explicit-aeo-audit-marketing-site
evals.prompt: Do an AEO audit of https://www.notion.so — I want to know how well it shows up when people ask ChatGPT and Perplexity for a notes/productivity app. Give it a grade.
evals.expected_output: Asks 1-3 clarifying questions (target queries / page intent) before or alongside grading, runs the scanner, returns a letter grade with the 5-category weighted table, names the biggest lever, and gives ranked, page-specific (non-generic) fixes.

evals.name: casual-url-paste
evals.prompt: how does https://www.anthropic.com do for ai search / getting cited by llms? just curious how it scores
evals.expected_output: Recognizes this as an AEO grade request, clarifies what to grade for, scans the page, and produces a graded report with specific fixes grounded in the actual scan rather than boilerplate.
